relative_path: 5. Writing and dissemination/Manuscript/Revisions_from_CancerDiscovery/Re-Submission after provisional acceptance 2026/Copy of Cover_Letter-R2.md
full_text:
[Dear Dr. Michele Hartsough,]{.mark}

[We are pleased to submit our revised manuscript titled
**"**]{.mark}*Single-cell spatial atlas of high-grade serous ovarian
cancer uncovers MHC class II as a key predictor of spatial tumor
ecosystems and clinical outcomes*[**"**.]{.mark}

We sincerely thank you and the reviewers for their positive comments. We
have now addressed all the remaining comments.

[Thank you for working with us on our manuscript. We look forward to the
opportunity to contribute to *Cancer Discovery*.]{.mark}

[Yours sincerely,]{.mark}

![A signature on a white background Description automatically
generated](media/image3.jpg){width="1.7554286964129484in"
height="0.5212456255468066in"}

Anniina Färkkilä\
MD PhD, Assistant Professor in Translational Gynecologic Oncology\
Specialist in Obstetrics and Gynecology\
\
Research Program in Systems Oncology &\
Department of Oncology and Obstetrics and Gynecology\
HiLIFE and FIMM University of Helsinki and Helsinki University Hospital\
B327b 00014 University of Helsinki\
www.farkkilab.org\
anniina.farkkila@helsinki.fi\
+358505967786
